column10: If "Both" is selected for the Agent Rep, then only one task instance is created.
column12:
Review all documents submitted with the transaction. Ensure that each document is signed by both the buyer and seller. If any documents are not signed, or if any documents are missing, email the agent to request the signatures/documents. Attach any unsigned documents to the email. Be sure to review each counter offer and the last page of the purchase agreement. Edit the script to describe the missing signatures and/or documents before sending.

Documents to Review:
 Purchase Agreement
 Counter Offer(s) – If applicable

If the buyer does not need to provide any additional documentation, complete the task. If you are unable to complete the task, reschedule it to follow up again tomorrow.
